title: Many_to_many join via assoc/2
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_tagged_with/1` that takes a list of tag names and returns posts that have ANY of those tags. Use `join: t in assoc(p, :tags)` for the many_to_many relation. Filter via `t.name in ^names`. Return distinct posts. Pin the names list. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: Requires knowing that `assoc/2` handles many_to_many transparently (no manual join-through table).
